caption: A video begins with a close-up, partially obscured shot of a blue and white flag featuring a yellow star. The scene then transitions to a stark white background where a logo for the IIEA appears. The logo consists of a blue rectangle containing a circle of yellow stars, similar to the European Union flag. Below this graphic, the text "IIEA" is written in a serif font, followed by the website "iiea.com" and the slogan "Sharing Ideas Shaping Policy" in a smaller, sans-serif font. This logo remains centered on the white background across the subsequent frames, with no changes to the text or imagery, creating a static title or closing screen.
